ksa_text: Knowledge of AI governance and regulatory compliance requirements, including the EU AI Act risk classification system, NIST AI RMF governance functions, organizational AI policy design, and conformity assessment procedures.

dcwf.top_element_label: Research the latest machine learning and AI tools, techniques, and best practices.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Research the latest machine learning and AI tools, techniques, and best practices.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to AI Risk and Ethics Specialist scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("risk classif", "ai governance", "ai policy"). STRM composite is moderate (0.4451); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 2 job-posting-level and 1 certification-level matches (CRISC, CISM, FRM, NIST AI RMF, SR 11-7, IAPP). Competency appears regularly in RSK role descriptions and/or certification curricula.

decision_rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to AI Risk and Ethics Specialist scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("risk classif", "ai governance", "ai policy").
